en.name: Star Battle
en.desc: Place stars in the grid! Each row, column, and region must contain exactly two stars. Stars can never touch each other, not even diagonally.
en.howToPlay: Click cells to place stars. Each colored region needs 2 stars. Stars cannot be adjacent horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. Use logic to deduce valid positions.
tips: Start with small regions - they have fewer options
If a star is placed, mark all adjacent cells as empty
Regions with 2 stars in 3 cells are constrained

zh.name: 星星大战
zh.desc: 在网格中放置星星！每行、每列和每个区域必须恰好包含两颗星星。星星永远不能相互接触，甚至对角线也不行。
zh.howToPlay: 点击格子放置星星。每行每列必须恰好有两颗星。每个区域必须恰好有两颗星。没有两颗星可以相邻（包括对角线）。
tips: 从小区域开始——它们约束最多
记住对角线相邻也禁止
使用排除法找到可能的位置
交叉约束揭示必要位置
